phrases.english: I am very happy today because I achieved my goal.
phrases.arabic: أنا سعيد جداً اليوم لأنني حققت هدفي.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana sa'eed jiddan al-yawm li'annani haqaqtu hadafi.

phrases.english: This beautiful weather makes me feel joyful.
phrases.arabic: هذا الجو الجميل يجعلني أشعر بالسعادة.
phrases.pronunciation: Hadha al-jaww al-jameel yaj'aluni ash'ur bis-sa'adah.
phrases.context: Connecting a pleasant environment to a feeling of happiness.

phrases.english: Seeing my family always brings me great happiness.
phrases.arabic: رؤية عائلتي دائماً تجلب لي سعادة كبيرة.
phrases.pronunciation: Ru'yat 'a'ilati da'iman tajlib li sa'adah kabirah.
phrases.context: Describing a source of consistent happiness.

phrases.english: I wish you all the happiness in the world.
phrases.arabic: أتمنى لك كل السعادة في العالم.
phrases.context: Offering a heartfelt wish for someone's well-being.

phrases.english: Finding this book was a moment of pure bliss.
phrases.arabic: العثور على هذا الكتاب كان لحظة سعادة غامرة.
phrases.pronunciation: Al-'uthur 'ala hadha al-kitab kana lahzhat sa'adah ghamirah.
phrases.context: Highlighting a specific event that caused intense happiness.
